-- 4 of 6 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to use Facebook ad
tools as guidelines for decision making. This is important
because you want to know whether or not your ad is
working as soon as possible in order to double down on
ad spend or cut your losses as soon as possible to save
money.
LESSON:
SPEND GUIDELINES FOR
PROSPECTING
